ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer type (e.g., individual, business) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer */,
  "annual_income" TEXT /* Annual income of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_customer_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_type_id") REFERENCES customer_types ("customer_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_types" (
  "customer_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer type */,
  "customer_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the customer type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the address belongs to */,
  "address_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the address type (e.g., billing, shipping) */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City */,
  "state" TEXT /* State */,
  "zipcode" INTEGER /* Zipcode */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the address */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addresses_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addresses_address_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_type_id") REFERENCES address_types ("address_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "address_types" (
  "address_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address type */,
  "address_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the address type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the address type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "address_history" (
  "address_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address history entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the address history belongs to */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the address */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the address became effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the address expired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_address_history_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_address_history_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "login_history" (
  "login_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each login history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the login history belongs to */,
  "login_date" TEXT /* Date the user logged in */,
  "logout_date" TEXT /* Date the user logged out */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("login_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_login_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the interaction belongs to */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date the interaction occurred */,
  "interaction_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction type */,
  "interaction_details" TEXT /* Details of the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_interaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_type_id") REFERENCES interaction_types ("interaction_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_types" (
  "interaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction type */,
  "interaction_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the interaction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the note belongs to */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_notes_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the campaign started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the campaign ended */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget for the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_campaigns" (
  "customer_campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer-campaign relationship */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_campaigns_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_campaigns_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_purchase_history" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the purchase belongs to */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the purchase was made */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product purchased */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product purchased */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_purchase_history_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_purchase_history_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geolocation_data" (
  "geolocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geolocation entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the geolocation belongs to */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the customer's location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the customer's location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer's location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer's location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer's location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geolocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geolocation_data_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
